title: Draft RBI (Commercial Banks – Classification, Valuation & Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI draft amendments discontinue the Investment Fluctuation Reserve requirement for banks. The balance can now be counted as Tier 1 capital, improving capital adequacy and simplifying norms.
The post Draft RBI (Commercial Banks – Classification, Valuation & Operation of Investment Portfolio) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
